characters.name: Abuto
characters.description: AbutoPresentPastInformationJapanese Name:阿伏兎Romanized Name:AbutoOfficial English Name:AbutoDate of Birth:10 Feb/AquariusAge:32Physical FeaturesRace:Yato TribeGender:MaleHeight:186 cm (6' 1")Weight:82 kg (180 lb)Eye Color:BlackHair Color:Ash brownStatus:AliveProfessional StatusAffiliation(s):Harusame(Defected)KiheitaiOccupation(s):Vice-Captain of Harusame's 7th DivisionFirst AppearancesChapter:Lesson 212(unofficial)Lesson 213(official)Volume:25Episode:Episode 140Voice ActorsJapanese VA:Otsuka HouchuuEnglish VA:Kyle C. Jones(movie)  "Compared to us Yato, all earthlings have tiny dicks." Abuto is considerably more laid-back as compared to otherYatomembers. Unlike most of them, he doesn't like fighting people of his kind, and actually treasures them. As such, he is often exasperated at Kamui's bloodlust. He seems to hold no hatred towards any of his enemies and even helped Umibozu despite Kamui wanting to kill him. The only enemy he was shown being truly afraid of was Utsuro. Abuto was also willing to let Kamui attack and possibly kill him while lost in his instincts because he felt that as his friend and comrade he had a duty to help Kamui come back to sanity showing he possess a strong sense of loyalty. As shown during his battle againstKagura, he sees life as a series of questions with right and wrong answers. One example is when he gave Kagura an ultimatum: which one between herself andShinpachishould die first, and when she asked him to let go of Shinpachi instead, Abuto proceeded to try and kill the latter. He also believes that one should stay by his or her decisions. Although Kagura and Shinpachi were his enemies, he decided to save them from a fall at the end of their fight, showing that he might be capable of mercy towards his enemies or he might have a soft spot for younger people. Although during theShogun Assassination Arcwhen he met Kagura again, he stated he wouldn't hesitate anymore while fighting her (as he said he did during their battle inYoshiwara). Abuto is very concerned about the Yato and believes that fostering connection between the living members of their species is important. He hates killing other Yato and avoids it as much as he can. He also believes that older Yato should look out for the younger causing him to be softer on Kagura and Kamui. He often upset my Kamui's dismissal of the death of Yato in the 7th division because he is worried that they may go extinct.

characters.description: Amarao DaisakuInformationJapanese Name:甘羅尾 大作Romanized Name:EbinaOfficial English Name:Daisaku AmaraoPhysical FeaturesRace:HumanGender:MaleEye Color:Dark BlueHair Color:BlackStatus:AliveProfessional StatusAffiliation(s):F.C. OedoOccupation(s):Soccer playerFirst AppearancesEpisode:Episode 106Voice ActorsJapanese VA:Onosaka MasayaAmarao Daisaku(甘羅尾 大作) is the star player of the F.C. Oedo, a soccer team ofEdo. He only appears inEpisode 106. Amarao wanted to score a goal for his little boy during his soccer retirement game, but all of his teammates were accidentally knocked out byKagurawhen she gave them water from the janitors bucket. Because of this,Gintokiunited a group of people to replace his team:Hasegawa,Tae,Sachan,Zura,ElizabethandKondoualongside himself withShinpachiand Kagura. They were against FC Oedo Ambivalence comprising of the 11Matsuno Brothers, but lost ultimately. At the end, it turned out that his "little boy' was actually his penis and he was just scoring for a girl.

characters.name: Ane
characters.description:
AneInformationJapanese Name:阿音Romanized Name:AneOfficial English Name:AneDate of Birth:1 Jun/GeminiPhysical FeaturesRace:HumanGender:FemaleHeight:170 cm (5' 7")Weight:55 kg (121 lb)Eye Color:BlackHair Color:BlackStatus:AliveProfessional StatusAffiliation(s):Snack SmileOccupation(s):Cabaret HostessRelative(s):Mone(younger twin sister)First AppearancesChapter:Lesson 71Episode:Episode 45Voice ActorsJapanese VA:Okamoto Maya Ane(阿音), along with her younger twin sisterMoneand theInugami,SadaharuandKomakowere in charge of protecting theKoryuumon, the largest Dragon Hole (龍穴,ryuuketsu), which directs the energy flow of the planet. The Amanto, however, built the Terminal right on top of it, driving the sisters out of business. Since then, Ane has been working as a hostess at 'Snack Smile', where she, along withShimura Tae, attracts the most customers by using her priestess image, something her sister disapproves of. Ane has long, black hair reaching the middle of her back, tied at the end. She has a parted fringe, with a lock of hair on both side of her face, which she also ties sometimes. She is always seen to wear a typical priestess clothing, with redhakamaand a whitehaori. She also wears a necklace with a singlemagatama. Ane think very lowly of men, placing them inferior to dogs.
Ane is shown to be fiercely competitive as seen during her money-raising race withOtaewhen she resorted to blackmailing her customer,Matsudaira Katakurikoof all people, into spending more money or she'd tell his wife.
Even though she bitterly argues with her sister, she cares deeply for her and is concerned for her safety. She is also regretful for abandoning Sadaharu and offers to take him back.

characters.name: Anigasaki Momo
characters.description: Anigasaki MomoInformationJapanese Name:兄ヶ崎百々Romanized Name:Anigasaki MomoOfficial English Name:Momo AnigasakiPhysical FeaturesRace:Virtual HumanGender:FemaleEye Color:BrownHair Color:BrownStatus:AliveFirst AppearancesEpisode:Episode 228Voice ActorsJapanese VA:Endo Aya Anigasaki Momo(兄ヶ崎百々) is one of three virtual heroines in the popular dating sim game,Love Choriss. She is the chosen byShimura Shinpachiduring theLove Choriss Arc. She has brown hair and brown eyes. She wears a pink kimono withsakurapattern. Anigasaki Momo assumes a big sister-like figure to the game player. Like the other virtual heroines of Love Choriss, her personality can be slightly modified depending on what the player does in-game. As shown, one player maximized his Momo's sexual desire so that they would French kiss in the park, however, Shinpachi's Momo is shown to be more desirable when her characteristics as a big sister are maximized.

characters.name: Antenmaru
characters.description: AntenmaruInformationJapanese Name:闇天丸Romanized Name:AntenmaruOfficial English Name:AntenmaruPhysical FeaturesRace:Evil Demon GodEye Color:RedHair Color:BlackStatus:DeceasedProfessional StatusAffiliation(s):Ketsuno FamilyVoice ActorsJapanese VA:Kazuyuki Ishikawa Antenmaru(闇天丸) was one of the strongest of the wrathful gods once sealed away by the Ketsuno clan's predecessors.Shirino Doumanbrought him back into this world to use his power to win againstKetsuno Seimei, however would be completely consumed by the demon god and was ultimately stopped by the combined efforts of the Ketsuno and Shirino clans along with the Yorozuya.

characters.name: Archfiend Tapir
characters.description: Archfiend TapirInformationRomanized Name:TapirOfficial English Name:TapirPhysical FeaturesRace:VirusesGender:MaleStatus:DeceasedProfessional StatusOccupation(s):ArchfiendStrong Point(s):Evil and ruthlessVoice ActorsJapanese VA:Kiyoyuki YanadaArchfiend Tapirwas an evil and powerfulTapircomputer virus that infectedTamaand tried to take over the world by spreading itself into all computers. He was the main antagonist of theTama Quest Arc. As a Tapir virus he was just a simple harmful software application, but after entering Tama and evolving due to her advanced software, he gained a humanoid yet monstrous form, with shaggy hair, horns, large bulky armor and a hideous appearance that was never fully seen. As he took over Tama's body, his appearance began to change and upon taking full control of her he began to look exactly like Tama in appearance and voice while still wearing the bulky armor. Archfiend Tapir was originally aTapircomputer virus designed to evolve and become stronger than its host, which will ultimately destroy the host. It infected Tama while she was searching the internet, thus, he evolved into a highly advanced AI due to her advanced programming. With his new found intelligence and power, he became the most powerful virus in the world and sought a new ambition which was to take over all the computers in the world and become a true archfiend. He then produced countless Tapir subordinates to aid in his endeavor to take over Tama and then the world.

characters.description: Asaemon IkedaPresentChildhood2 years later (silver soul-climax)InformationJapanese Name:池田 朝右衛門Romanized Name:Ikeda AsaemonOfficial English Name:Asaemon IkedaTitles:Shinigami (formerly)17th Ikeda Yaemon19th Ikeda YaemonPhysical FeaturesRace:HumanGender:FemaleEye Color:PurpleHair Color:GreyStatus:AliveProfessional StatusAffiliation(s):Ikeda ClanOccupation(s):ExecutionerRelative(s):Unnamed motherUnnamed father (deceased)16th Ikeda Yaemon(adoptive father)18th Ikeda Yaemon(adoptive brother)First AppearancesChapter:Lesson 463Volume:52Episode:Episode 279Voice ActorsJapanese VA:Inoue MarinaEnglish VA:Carol-Anne Day Unnamed father (deceased)16th Ikeda Yaemon(adoptive father)18th Ikeda Yaemon(adoptive brother) Ikeda Asaemon(池田 朝右衛門, IkedaAsaemon) is the 19th Ikeda Yaemon of theIkeda Clan. Beforehand, she was adopted into the clan and was given the title "17th Ikeda Yaemon" by her adoptive father, the16th Ikeda Yaemon. After failing to execute him with Kimoarai, she left the Ikeda Clan as a traitor, withher adoptive brotherbeing the successor of the title. Asaemon was then sold to theHitotsubashi Factionby the 18th Ikeda Yaemon, but she survived and received the title again after his death. Asaemon tends to be emotionless at most times. However, when being touched inappropriately (even just at her skull mask, which she believes to be a private part), she can get violent and may cut down the molester as much as how she is touched. On another side, she really cares about theIkeda Clan, which she considers to be her family. To protect the family's name, Asaemon chose to leave the clan as a traitor who killed the previous Yaemon. After executing her former self of guilt and grief, Asaemon became more of a cheerful girl.

characters.name: Ayame Sarutobi
characters.description: Ayame SarutobiPresentChildhoodGenderbend2 Years LaterInformationJapanese Name:猿飛 あやめRomanized Name:Sarutobi AyameOfficial English Name:Ayame SarutobiDate of Birth:2 June/GeminiAge:20+Titles:SacchanPhysical FeaturesRace:HumanGender:FemaleHeight:169 cm (5' 6½")Weight:55 kg (121 lb)Eye Color:CharcoalHair Color:PurpleStatus:AliveProfessional StatusAffiliation(s):Oniwabanshu(Former)Diamond PerfumeOccupation(s):NinjaFirst AppearancesChapter:Lesson 40Volume:5Episode:Episode 1(Special)Episode 22(Official)Voice ActorsJapanese VA:Kobayashi YuuKazuyuki Okitsu(Dekobokko Arc)English VA:Carli Mosier(Movie)Nicole Bouma(Gintama°)Samuel Vincent(Dekobokko Arc)Jehane Seralles (Hulu Dub)Antonella Baldini(ep.1-49)Gea Riva(ep.50+)Alessandro Germano (Dekkoboko Arc)(Italian Dub) Jehane Seralles (Hulu Dub)Antonella Baldini(ep.1-49)Gea Riva(ep.50+)Alessandro Germano (Dekkoboko Arc)(Italian Dub)  Sacchan has a very loud personality. She has the tendency to scream and screech when excited or thrilled. She has a kind side which shown in glasses arc, SinceEpisode 22, after her encounter with Gintoki, she has evidently shown her masochistic side and infatuation with the samurai (not in the manga ver tho) and in most of her appearances she is seen stalking him. He often treats her badly, especially when she is doing that, but she gladly enjoys the treatment. Sacchan, however, does not like to be compared toKondo Isaoand his stalking toShimura Tae. Although she is often very boisterous, she is sometimes shown to be very grave and serious and worried for her comrades in certain situations, such as when her job was protecting the Shogun

characters.name: Ayumu Toujou
characters.description: Ayumu ToujouInformationJapanese Name:東城 歩Romanized Name:Tōjō AyumuOfficial English Name:Ayumu ToujouDate of Birth:14 Jan/CapricornPhysical FeaturesRace:HumanHeight:178 cm (5' 10")Weight:66 kg (145 lb)Hair Color:Light BeigeStatus:AliveProfessional StatusAffiliation(s):Yagyuu Family4 Devas (Shitennou)Occupation(s):4 Devas (Shitennou) leaderFirst AppearancesEpisode:Episode 77Voice ActorsJapanese VA:Yusa KoujiEnglish VA:Blake Shepard(movie) Right now, I'm just like that little ring thingy on the shower!! Whatever curtain is put on me, It's always “Shah”s to the left or the right!! Shah-ing between the dojo and loft, Shah-ing between life and death! I’m doomed to keep Shah-ing until I die! I’ll be just like those Shah-rails! I’m just a great big shah!! But there's shah thing I can do! I’m a Shah! Ayumu Toujou(東城 歩,Tōjō Ayumu?)is the leader of theShitennouaka 4 Devas, thedojoguardians of theYagyuu Family. Tojou is Kyubei's servant, who is extremely dedicated, if not obsessive, in his concern for his young master. Toujou generally speaks in a very polite manner, he uses the more formalwatashi('私') instead ofboku('僕') orore('俺'), to refer to himself. He is extremely particular about the freshness of the raw eggs he gets for histamagokakegohanbreakfast that he flies into a rage if the egg yolk breaks, indicating that it is not fresh. He is loyal to the Yagyuu house and he can be merciless in his mission to protect the Yagyuu reputation, seen when he punished Minamoto for deserting his ally, by breaking his dish personally during the dojo challenge in ep.77. He has a fetish for Gothic Lolita costumes which he keeps trying to get Kyuubei to put on, even though Kyuubei shows an openly strong dislike of him fussing, and of his myriad attempts to get her to put on the Gothic Lolita costumes. He acknowledges that he is a comic relief character in Kintama arc.

characters.name: Banzou
characters.description: BanzouInformationJapanese Name:蛮蔵Date of Birth:December 17- SagittariusAlso Known As:Mamushi no BanzouBanzou the Viper"the plant Boss"Physical FeaturesGender:MaleHeight:170cmWeight:64kgHair Color:Dark Golden Rod BrownStatus:DeceasedFirst AppearancesEpisode:Episode 32Voice ActorsJapanese VA:Ugaki Hidenari Banzou(蛮蔵), also known asmamushi no banzou (マムシの蛮蔵)is the originator of theJustawayexplosive. He used to work in a government office as a cop[1]but got laid off, and he became a terrorist in his bitterness. He started a factory, taking in displaced and bitter samurai who also wanted revenge. The factory acts as a front for the manufacture ofJustaway, which is actually a bomb.Yamazaki Sagaruwas sent to the factory as a spy to uncover more about the mysterious Justaway. It turned out that the factory also manufactured heavy artillery like the Mamushi-Z laser cannon.

characters.name: Binbokusai Yagyuu
characters.description: Binbokusai YagyuuInformationJapanese Name:柳生 敏木斎Romanized Name:Yagyū BinbokusaiOfficial English Name:Binbokusai YagyuuDate of Birth:30 May/GeminiPhysical FeaturesRace:HumanHeight:88 cm (2' 10½")Weight:24 kg (53 lb)Eye Color:BlackHair Color:silverStatus:AliveProfessional StatusAffiliation(s):Yagyuu FamilyRelative(s):Kyuubei Yagyuu(granddaughter)Koshinori Yagyuu(son)Unnamed daughter-in-law (deceased)First AppearancesEpisode:Episode 77Voice ActorsJapanese VA:Tatsuta Naoki Koshinori Yagyuu(son)Unnamed daughter-in-law (deceased) Binbokusai Yagyuu(柳生 敏木斎,Yagyū Binbokusai?)is the grand patriarch of the Yagyuu Family. He is the sword master toYagyuu Kyuubei. Binbokusai has an easy going and care free personality, much likeSakata Gintoki. He doesn't like wasting anything, to the point that he scavenges cartload of discarded items/junks during his free time[1](though one has to wonder how he'll manage to reuse all of them...). InEpisode 77, he also ateShimura Tae's 'dark matter', i.e. burnt fried egg, saying it would be a waste not to eat it (he suffered the consequence later inEpisode 79...). He was also one of the few, if not only one in Yagyuu family who would have accepted Otae as Kyuubei's wife without issues.

characters.name: Blu-rayko
characters.description: Blu-raykoInformationJapanese Name:ブルー霊子Romanized Name:Blu-raykoOfficial English Name:Blu-raykoAge:UnknownPhysical FeaturesRace:Computer virusGender:FemaleEye Color:RedHair Color:Light BlueStatus:AliveFirst AppearancesEpisode:Episode 224Voice ActorsJapanese VA:Miyuki Sawashiro Blu-rayko(ブルー霊子) is a computer virus in the form of a girl who lives in a "cursed" Blu-ray disk. Her name is a blend ofBurū-rei(ブルーレイ) "Blu-ray",Yūrei(幽霊) "Ghost" and "Reiko", a female Japanese name. Blu-rayko (Blu-wraith) has short light blue hair and dark reddish eyes. She has "wings" that are much like angels wings, and bandages covering a good portion of her body (almost completely when she first appears), including her right eye. She walks in a very "ghost-like" manner. She appears to be obsessed with herkotatsu, and constantly worries about forgetting to turn it off. Because of her past, she is extremely depressed, to the point where all of the channels on the TV turns blue.

characters.name: Chougorou
characters.description: ChougorouInformationJapanese Name:長五郎Romanized Name:ChōgorōOfficial English Name:ChougorouDate of Birth:1 Oct/LibraTitles:Kitsunebi no ChougorouPhysical FeaturesRace:HumanGender:MaleHeight:161 cm (5' 3½")Weight:49 kg (108 lb)Status:AliveProfessional StatusAffiliation(s):Ninjas(former)Ring Kyuubi(former)Occupation(s):Working at a KioskFirst AppearancesEpisode:Episode 84Voice ActorsJapanese VA:Tsukada Masaaki Chougorou( 長五郎 ) is a thief who wears a fox-mask whom Kozenigata has been pursuing for 20 over years. Chogorou is an old man with a normal attire on his daily jobs but has he takes on his other persona kitsunebi no Chogorou he wears a white ninja outfit and a fox mask and a nodachi behind his back. His daytime persona is as a seemingly harmless elderly man selling food and drinks in a small outdoor kiosk, which Kozenigata frequents and to whom he typically pours out all his sorrows while downing glasses ofsochu. Kozenigata also likes to address the kiosk operator as Master, the Japanese term for bar-tender in a higher class pub. He has another persona which is Kitsunebi no Chogorou when he takes on this persona he tends to steal from wealthy families and give it to the poor it was this way that he built his infamous reputation. He also was quite crafty has he never told Kozenigata, his pursuer, his true identity even thou he frequented his kiosk every day.
